name: Renowned Solutions LLC
recent_news: No public news, M&A, or operating footprint found. No website, no social media, no FMCSA/SAFER hits associated with the Killeen address. Generic LLC name; likely a micro NEMT or paratransit operator rather than a yellow school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus contractor based on available evidence; sub-$1M revenue micro-operator with no district contracts surfaced. Not a viable Summit tuck-in; deprioritize unless ground-level intel confirms otherwise.

name: Transportation Partners LLC
recent_news: No web/news footprint at 1653 Bush Ave, Saint Paul. St. Paul SPED student transport is handled by larger operators (CST, Bille Bus, Safaari, EverDriven) - no indication this micro-entity is a district contractor. Likely a small NEMT under MN's MNET program rather than a school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Not a yellow-school-bus contractor based on available evidence; sub-$1M generic-named LLC with no public footprint. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target.

name: Exclusive Limousine
recent_news: Listed in Mesa limo/sedan directories; phone (480) 461-9907 appears in Mesa limousine listings. No evidence of school-district contracts, SPED routing, or yellow-bus operations. Mesa PO Box only - no terminal/yard footprint typical of a bus contractor.
fit_notes: Limo/black-car operator, not a student-transport contractor. Out of scope for Summit; do not pursue as a tuck-in.

name: Silver Shadow Svc
recent_news: No public school-transport footprint. PO Box only Mesa address; name and channel-listings pattern consistent with a small livery/limo or shuttle service, not a school-bus contractor. Distinct from 'Shadow Transport LLC' (an unrelated auto-hauling carrier in Mesa).
fit_notes: Sub-scale livery/limo operator with no district contracts evident; not a school-bus operator. Out of scope for Summit.

name: TLC Taxi
recent_news: Yelp listing for 'TLC Cab' in Glendale, AZ shows CLOSED status as of November 2025. Taxi-based livery operator, not a yellow school-bus contractor. Glendale's school transportation is handled by district fleets and other providers (e.g., School Cab).
fit_notes: Defunct/closed taxi operator - not an operating school-transport business. Do not pursue; remove from target universe.
